globals.signature: float TraceLinePlayersIncluded(Vector start, Vector end, entity entToIgnore)

globals.signature: handle TracePortalLine(Vector start, Vector end, int mask, object ignore, int collisionGroup, bool transformTrace)
globals.doc: Same as TraceLineEx, but will transform the trace based on any portals it passes through. If the last bool is true, it will transform based on the first portal it went though.
Always returns true. Used in Portal 2 to test if DLC1 was installed.
Generate a string guaranteed to be unique across the life of the script VM, with an optional root string. Useful for adding data to tables when not sure what keys are already in use in that table.

Add Potatos to the player's held portal gun, and force it to be a dual device.
